Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the total time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that later experience a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants where rejection occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include both approval steps
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually lead to a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that proceed directly to supervisor approval without budget owner involvement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE, specifically in cases belonging to the 2018 university-wide data subset
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Payment Handled in variants that skip the budget owner step
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in parallel approval paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case
